description:
Advances: mutagen.mutation_pipeline

Closes **F8 / CF5** (HIGH consensus from Idioms + Distributed + Performance — Idioms H1, Distributed MEDIUM-3, Performance F-PERF-09).

Two helpers (`safe_compile_quoted` in mutation_runner.ex:402-436 and `capture_stderr` in mutation_runner/mutation_loop.ex:186-207) use a process-dictionary side-channel to extract a value from the closure passed into `ExUnit.CaptureIO.capture_io/2`. Works only because `capture_io` happens to execute the closure synchronously in the calling process — undocumented implementation detail.

The stdlib already provides `ExUnit.CaptureIO.with_io/3` which returns `{result, captured_string}` directly. Replacing the pattern removes ~30 LOC per call site, eliminates the `make_ref` / `Process.put` / `Process.delete` lifetime bookkeeping, and removes the brittle dependency on capture_io implementation details.

## Deliverable

- Replace both call sites with `ExUnit.CaptureIO.with_io/3` (note: requires Elixir 1.10+; project is on 1.19.5).
- Delete `make_ref` / `Process.put` / `Process.delete` scaffolding at both sites.
- Update any tests that depended on the smuggle pattern (probably none — tests should be black-box).
- Revise `.spec/specs/mutation_pipeline.spec.md`: capture-io contract updates if any (this is largely an internal refactor; spec may not need touching).

## Verification

- Existing tests in mutation_runner_test.exs continue to pass without modification (behavior-equivalent)
- mix compile --warnings-as-errors / mix test green
- LOC delta: ~-60 lines (~30 per site)

## Allowed touches

- lib/mutagen_ex/mutation_runner.ex (lines 402-436 region)
- lib/mutagen_ex/mutation_runner/mutation_loop.ex (lines 186-207 region)
- Corresponding test files only if behaviorally needed
- .spec/specs/mutation_pipeline.spec.md only if a spec invariant becomes documentable
- README.md, CHANGELOG.md

## Out of Scope

- Do not refactor `MutationLoop.run/1` orchestration beyond the capture-io swap — that is .18 + .25 territory
- Do not change which streams are captured (still stderr in the loop, mixed for the compile)

## Merge gate
- [ ] mix test green (no test changes expected)
- [ ] LOC delta is negative (verify with git diff --stat)
- [ ] Auditor APPROVE
title: Replace Process.put smuggle with ExUnit.CaptureIO.with_io/3
